---
title: "Why licensing is not enough"
format: html

previous:
  href: "Creator-Effective OERs.html"
  text: "The Qualities of Effective OERs"

next:
  href: "Creator-Design.html"
  text: "Designing OERs for Reuse"
---

A CC BY licence on its own does not guarantee practical usability. Effective OERs must also include:

-   editable files;
-   source code or raw media;
-   modular structure;
-   accessibility features; and
-   context free design (<abbr class="uos-Amethyst"  title="The advanced module in this training programme gives an example of how to index keywords and links to allow future authors to rapidly edit an OER.">avoiding hard-coded references</abbr>).

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-alt="Go to next page: Creator-Design.html" fig-align="center" width="50"}](/OERs%20for%20creators/Creator-Design.html)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
